Owner can read their own backer-stripe-c.name: Owner can read their own backer-stripe-customer mapping

Public can read media of live or succeed.name: Public can read media of live or succeeded campaigns
Public can read media of live or succeed.using: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM campaigns c WHERE c.id = "campaign_media"."campaign_id" AND c.status IN ('live', 'succeeded'))

Owner can read media of their own campai.name: Owner can read media of their own campaigns
Owner can read media of their own campai.using: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM campaigns c WHERE c.id = "campaign_media"."campaign_id" AND c.creator_id = (SELECT auth.uid()))

Owner can insert media on their own camp.name: Owner can insert media on their own campaigns
Owner can insert media on their own camp.withCheck: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM campaigns c WHERE c.id = "campaign_media"."campaign_id" AND c.creator_id = (SELECT auth.uid()))

Owner can delete media on their own camp.using: EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM campaigns c WHERE c.id = "campaign_media"."campaign_id" AND c.creator_id = (SELECT auth.uid()))

Public can read non-backers-only publish.name: Public can read non-backers-only published updates

Backers can read backers-only updates on.name: Backers can read backers-only updates on their campaigns
Backers can read backers-only updates on.using:
"campaign_updates"."published_at" IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM pledges p
      WHERE p.campaign_id = "campaign_updates"."campaign_id"
        AND p.backer_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
        AND p.status IN ('pending', 'charged')
    )

Creator can read items on pledges to the.name: Creator can read items on pledges to their campaigns
Creator can read items on pledges to the.using:
EXISTS (
      SELECT 1 FROM pledges p
      JOIN campaigns c ON c.id = p.campaign_id
      WHERE p.id = "pledge_items"."pledge_id" AND c.creator_id = (SELECT auth.uid())
    )
